//: Register mt5-trading-mcp with Hermes (Nous Research). NOTE: Hermes uses a snake_case 'mcp_servers' block and an 'include' tool-allowlist - both are Hermes-specific. Other MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor; see the other *.json beside this file) use 'mcpServers' and may not honor 'include', which would expose ALL tools. The 'include' list below is scoped to the READ-ONLY tools so the agent cannot place trades by default; drop it (or add place_order / modify_order / cancel_order / close_position) to allow trading.
